Title: Design responsible AI security, governance, risk management, and compliance
Description: Learn to design secure, governed, and compliant AI systems that align with organizational policies and Responsible AI principles.

Description: Learn dimensional schema types, fact and dimension table design, and slowly changing dimension patterns for analytics workloads in Microsoft Fabric.

Description: MSIX app attach is a way to deliver MSIX applications to both physical and virtual machines. MSIX app attach is different from regular MSIX because it’s specifically for Azure Virtual Desktop.

Description: Discover and assess AI data risks in your environment using Microsoft Purview Data Security Posture Management (DSPM) for AI. Configure DSPM, assess SharePoint overexposure, and identify risks in Copilot and AI app interactions.

Title: Sketch the future - AI concept art with Microsoft Copilot and Designer
Description: Explore how Microsoft Copilot and Designer can support pre-production planning for animated projects, from generating structured animation roadmaps to creating visual concept frames and style guides.

Title: Manage device authentication
Description: In this module, you learn about device authentication and management in Microsoft Entra ID. MD-102

Description: Learn how to secure and harden Internet Information Services (IIS) to protect your web applications and data from potential threats. This module covers best practices for authentication, authorization, server and website hardening, certificate configuration, and more.

Title: Validate your startup idea with customers
Description: Explore various ways to validate your startup idea with customers. Learn about tools and strategies for testing your startup assumptions.

Description: This module introduces GitHub Copilot Cloud Agent , showing how it automates routine tasks, manages pull requests, and integrates into your development workflow.

Description: Learn how to create and manage SMB volumes and how to control access to an SMB volume through permissions. Learn to enable Continuous Availability on existing SMB volumes and use DFS Namespaces with Azure NetApp Files.

Description: Learn to create a capacity pool, which enables you to create volumes. Learn ways to manage a QoS capacity pool by setting it up and monitoring throughput. Use tags to help you manage Azure NetApp Files billing and expenses.

Title: Introduction to prompt engineering with GitHub Copilot
Description: This module highlights the basic core principles of prompt engineering and explains the best practices to create prompts quickly and effectively in GitHub Copilot. Learn the strategies that transform comments into precise code, identify the steps within GitHub Copilot's prompt processing flow, and gain an understanding of the important role that Large Language Models (LLMs) play in enhancing suggestion quality. Discover advanced techniques like role prompting and chat history management to accelerate development workflows and optimize resource usage.

Title: Implement and manage storage for Azure Virtual Desktop
Description: FSLogix roams profiles in remote computing environments, such as Azure Virtual Desktop. You set up a FSLogix profile container share for a host pool using a virtual machine-based file share.

Description: Discover indexes and indexing policies in Azure Cosmos DB for NoSQL.

Description: Azure Architects design and recommend data integration solutions.

Title: Foundations of SaaS
Description: Learn about Software as a Service (SaaS), service-level agreement (SLA) and service-level objectives (SLO), security and compliance, and pricing.

Description: Govern the enterprise agent lifecycle in Microsoft Foundry. Design agent versioning strategies and approval workflows, implement usage quotas and cost allocation models, establish change management processes for behavioral updates, and design agent retirement workflows that minimize business disruption.

Description: Vision-enabled models in Foundry enable developers to create intelligent solutions that analysis images, and generate images and video.

Title: Describe the sustainability practices in datacenters
Description: Datacenters are the backbone of our connected world, powering everything from social media to critical business operations. Recognizing their significant role, the datacenter industry is embracing sustainability with a strong commitment to reducing its carbon footprint and enhancing energy efficiency. These efforts are paving the way for a greener, more sustainable future while continuing to support our digital lives. In this module, we focus on the importance of sustainability in datacenter operations. Topics include the use of renewable energy sources like solar and wind, and strategies for optimizing energy usage, and emergency power systems. We'll also explore advanced cooling techniques, including waste heat reuse, and water conservation practices. Additionally, you'll learn how KPIs help track sustainability progress and discover real-world case studies showcasing successful innovations in green datacenter design and operations.

Title: Describe access management capabilities of Microsoft Entra
Description: Describe access management capabilities of Microsoft Entra

Description: Learn how to use Azure App Configuration to store, organize, and retrieve application settings and feature flags in AI solutions on Azure, while securely referencing secrets stored in Azure Key Vault.

Description: AI agents are transforming how we interact with technology. In this module, you'll learn how to develop your first AI agent using Microsoft Foundry, a powerful platform for building and deploying AI solutions.

Description: Learn how to implement the A2A protocol to enable agent discovery, direct communication, and coordinated task execution across remote agents.

Description: Microsoft Fabric provides a scalable and flexible store for real-time data.

Description: In this module, you get an overview of each of the agents available in Azure Copilot and how you can use them to perform common Azure operations tasks more efficiently.

But to scale adoption and secure stakeholder buy-in, it's not enough to showcase innovation; leaders must clearly demonstrate the business value these agents deliver.
